---
title: "Interactive R session"
---

## List available software

Run `module avail` to see the extensive list of software pre-installed on Katana.

The following R versions are available

![](../screenshots/rversions.png){width=1.5in}

## Run interactive R

Run the following commands:

- `module load r/4.5.1`
- `R`

Now you are running R interactively! Within R, run:

- Run `install.packages("palmerpenguins")`
- Run `install.packages("ggplot2")`
- Quit by typing `q()`
- Do not save workspace image.

Notes on using interactive R:

- I rarely use this feature!
- Before running R, you have to run `module load` every time you log into Katana. You only have to run it once per session.
- I use it help me test whether a script will run, mostly to see if files are in the right place and libraries are installed.
- I also use this to install the necessary R libraries before running jobs, so I don't need to re-install packages every time I run a script.

::: {.page-nav}
<span class="nav-spacer"></span>

[Next: Running a job →](job.qmd)
:::
